title: Rapide Auto Extreme Car De-Icer Spray 750ml – Rapid Ice & Frost Remover for Windscreens, Fast-Acting Window Defroster, Winter Car Care Spray
features: Fast Ice Removal: Instantly melts frost and thick ice layers for clear visibility and safer winter driving.
High-Performance Formula: Contains LPG, ethyl alcohol, and ethanediol for rapid defrosting in extreme cold.
Large 750ml Volume: Long-lasting supply for repeated winter use on windscreens, mirrors, and windows.
Easy-to-Use Spray: Simply spray directly onto frozen surfaces for quick and effortless de-icing.
Suitable for All Vehicles: Ideal for cars, vans, trucks, and other vehicles during winter weather.
Convenient Winter Essential: Lightweight, portable, and perfect for keeping in the car for emergencies.
description: Rapide Auto Extreme Car De-Icer Spray 750ml – Rapid Ice & Frost Remover for Windscreens, Fast-Acting Window Defroster, Winter Car Care Spray Description: Volume: 750ml Function: Melts car window frost and ice fast Contains: LPG, Ethyl Alcohol, Ethanediol. Net Weight: 480g Gross Weight: 618g Packing list: 1 x Car Rapid De-Icer Spray Friendly Notes: A reasonable error with ±1-3cm for measurement. The variations in display settings and lighting conditions may casue color difference. Not for children under 3 years.
